headline: Regulators Didn’t Speak to US Fund at Heart of Segantii Trial
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The insider trading trial of hedge fund Segantii Capital Management enters a critical moment this week, as the prosecution wraps up its side of the case following testimony from an official at Hong Kong’s securities regulator. headline: Why The Flutter Entertainment (FLUT) Investment Narrative Is Shifting As Expectations And Valuations Reset
summary: Flutter Entertainment’s fair value estimate has been reset from $187.54 to $162.72, a move that trims the central valuation view by about 13.2%. This adjustment sits alongside a clear split in analyst opinion, with some treating lower targets as a reset of expectations, while others see them as a sign that growth and earnings assumptions may have been too optimistic. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape the way you interpret future updates on the stock. Stay...
